title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Chiffon, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Reiju, Unknown person #8 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UWOH!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: BEGE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Gegh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HUWAAH BUWAAH

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Look at Bege!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...what are you saying we should do then!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's taking all the attacks aimed at us, you know!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Cough...!! God dammit...!! only you guys succeeding...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: while we fail miserably... I can't live this down...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Please wait a second, Bege-san!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not going to drag us down with you, are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I also did every- thing I was supposed to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Return my heart now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah... dragging you down, huh... that sounds good too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...from the very start, I didn't care what happened to you guys.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But my precious subordinates... are also here...!! My beloved wife and son too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'd let them all die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Darling _____!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huwa aah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: faaather!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hah.... hah....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only one way for everyone to survive...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This room is inside of me, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whether I lean over or fall down, you will all be affected by it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hah

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same goes if I return to my normal human form.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up, I will return to a "human" with all of you inside....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Caesar will then carry me and escape through the air...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! Why are you casually putting my life on the line!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That plan's suicidal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll be shot full of holes instantly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The chance of it succeeding is zero!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are too many amusement Haki users out there!! There's no point even if I turn into gas!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Someone knows it

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: ...Answer one thing for me, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...why did you save us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We, whom you detest so much, fell into the enemy's trap so easily....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Because

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: My father would've been saddened...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If I held on to the hatred from my child- hood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please, let me out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Father!!! I'm sorry...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for being born so weak....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Save me!!! Father, save me!! Faaather!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if I became a petty man who would laugh at the death of his own blood relatives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...he would be appalled.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I refuse to live a life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't catch a cold.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: cannot face that person.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: _13 years ago, the Vinsmoke Sanji who escaped from Germa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: died on the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That was also what you wished for.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
